zh.lifeSummary: 當Philemon Dalton於1590年出生在英國英格蘭戴文艾可謝特時，他的父親George English Dalton55歲，母親Margaret37歲。他於1625年10月11日與Anne Cole在英國英格蘭素福爾可丹寧頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1662年6月4日在美國新罕布夏州洛金哈姆咸頓享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philemon Dalton于1590年出生在英国英格兰戴文艾可謝特时，他的父亲George English Dalton55岁，母亲Margaret37岁。他于1625年10月11日与Anne Cole在英国英格兰素福爾可丹寧頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1662年6月4日在美国新罕布什尔州洛金哈姆咸頓享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dalton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish: habitational name from any of various places called Dalton in Westmorland, Durham, Lancashire, Northumberland, and Yorkshire, from Old English dæl ‘valley’ (see Dale ) + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.
History: The surname was taken to Ireland by English traders in the early 13th century .

variants.name: Daughton
meanings: English (Lincolnshire) and Irish (Kilkenny and Tipperary): variant of   Dalton  .

variants.name: Dale
meanings: English: from Middle English dal, dale, daile ‘dale, valley’ (Old English dæl, reinforced in northern England by the cognate Old Norse dalr), a topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, or a habitational name from any of numerous minor places called with this word, such as Dale in Cumbria and Yorkshire.
Norwegian: habitational name from a common farm named from Old Norse dali, the dative case of dalr ‘valley’.

nameMeanings.name: Philemon
meanings: An old male name meaning 'to love'.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Philemon Dalton was born in 1590, in Exeter, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, George English Dalton, was 55 and his mother, Margaret, was 37. He married Anne Cole on 11 October 1625, in Dennington, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 4 June 1662, in Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, United States, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philemon Dalton est né en 1590, à Exeter, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, George English Dalton, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Anne Cole le 11 octobre 1625, à Dennington, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 juin 1662, à Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, États-Unis, à l’âge de 72 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philemon Dalton è nato il nel 1590 nel Exeter, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, George English Dalton, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Anne Cole il 11 ottobre 1625, nel Dennington, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 giugno 1662, nel Hampton, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 72 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Philemon Dalton(이)가 1590년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 세터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George English Dalton(은)는 55세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1625년 10월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 데닝턴에서 Anne Cole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1662년 6월 4일 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 함프턴에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.York, York, Massachusetts Bay, British C: ерк, ерк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philemon Dalton родился в 1590 г. в местности эксетир, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени George English Dalton было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Cole 11 октября 1625 г. в местности деннингтон, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 июня 1662 г. в местности хамптон, роккингхам, Нью-Гэмпшир, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philemon Dalton nació en 1590, en Exeter, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, George English Dalton, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Anne Cole el 11 de octubre de 1625, en Dennington, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de junio de 1662, en Hampton, Rockingham, Nuevo Hampshire, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 72 años.
